During a site visit to Abhishek Sonis location, I discovered an oil leak originating from a hose. To address this, I first drained 20 liters of oil from the separator tank and cooler, noting that approximately 50 liters had already been lost due to the leak. Although the remaining oil was still in good condition, the primary focus was on replacing the compromised parts. I replaced the leaking hose, specifically the TVB Out to Cooler IN part number 035305691, and also changed the hose from the separator tank to the TVB. To complete the service, I replaced the compressors air and oil filters and topped up the system with 40 liters of ELGI Air Lube Plus oil. Following these repairs, the machine is now operating effectively and in good condition. Schedule service symptoms created and closed.

The BDV kit, ARV kit, APV kit, Pressure regulator kit, acctuator kit was also replaced as part of the service protocol. After completing these tasks, the drain plugs were securely plugged in, and the oil tank was topped up with 40 litres of oil, accommodating one dead crank. Upon completion of the scheduled service, the unit was started and operated under load conditions. It was observed that the unit was running within normal parameters, indicating that the service was effective and the unit is functioning optimally.

To ensure optimal performance and maintenance of the equipment, the following service schedule will be executed: 1. **Oil Drainage**: Begin by draining oil from the tank and cooler, targeting a total of 38 liters. This step is crucial for maintaining the integrity of the system and preventing any potential damage from old oil. 2. **Filter Changes**: Proceed to replace the air filters for both the compressor and engine. Clean air intake is vital for efficient operation and longevity of the machinery. 3. **Oil Filter Replacement**: Change the oil filter to ensure that the new oil remains uncontaminated and that the system operates smoothly. 4. **Kit Replacements**: - Replace the ARV (Automatic Relief Valve) kit to maintain pressure regulation. - Change the BDV (Blow Down Valve) kit to ensure proper drainage and prevent any blockages. - Replace the actuator kit to ensure responsive operation of the system. - Change the pressure regulator kit to maintain consistent pressure levels. 5. **Lubrication**: Finally, add 40 liters of ELGI air lube plus oil to ensure that all moving parts are adequately lubricated, reducing wear and tear. After completing these tasks, start the unit and verify that it is running smoothly. This comprehensive maintenance will enhance the reliability and efficiency of the equipment.
